languages.text: Генетор Ферренц посвятил жизнь исследованию имплантов, способных передать точность движений рук хирургеона. Вивисектор Мартинакс помогал ему в изысканиях и надиктовал приставленному сервочерепу один из самых полных сборников размышлений о природе аугментации в Просторе Коронус.

Genetor Ferrenz dedicated his life to researching implants capable of replicating the precision of a chirurgeon's hand movements. Vivisector Martinax assisted him in his research and dictated to the assigned servo-skull one of the most comprehensive treatises on the nature of augmentation in the Koronus Expanse.
languages.original_text: Генетор Ферренц посвятил жизнь исследованию имплантов, способных передать точность движений рук хирургеона. Вивисектор Мартинакс помогал ему в изысканиях и надиктовал приставленному сервочерепу один из самых полных сборников размышлений о природе аугментации в Просторе Коронус.

traits.locale_text: Genetor Ferrenz dedicated his life to researching implants capable of replicating the precision of a chirurgeon's hand movements. Vivisector Martinax assisted him in his research and dictated to the assigned servo-skull one of the most comprehensive treatises on the nature of augmentation in the Koronus Expanse.

Genetor Ferrenz dedicated his life to researching implants capable of replicating the precision of a chirurgeon's hand movements. Vivisector Martinax assisted him in his research and dictated to the assigned servo-skull one of the most comprehensive treatises on the nature of augmentation in the Koronus Expanse.

Genetor Ferrenz dedicated his life to researching implants capable of replicating the precision of a chirurgeon's hand movements. Vivisector Martinax assisted him in his research and dictated to the assigned servo-skull one of the most comprehensive treatises on the nature of augmentation in the Koronus Expanse.

languages.text: ジェネターのフェレンツは、外科医の手の動きの精密さを再現しうるインプラントの研究に生涯を捧げた。ヴィヴィセクターのマルティナクスはその研究を補佐し、割り当てられたサーヴォスカルに、コロヌス・エクスパンスにおける強化の本質に関する最も包括的な論文の一つを口述したのだった。
languages.original_text: Genetor Ferrenz dedicated his life to researching implants capable of replicating the precision of a chirurgeon's hand movements. Vivisector Martinax assisted him in his research and dictated to the assigned servo-skull one of the most comprehensive treatises on the nature of augmentation in the Koronus Expanse.

traits.locale_text: ジェネター・フェレンツはセクター・ビオニカの責任者として、外科医の手の動きを再現できるインプラントの研究に生涯を捧げました。彼は、生体解剖学者のマーティナックスの協力を得て、増幅の性質に関する最も包括的な論文を、割り当てられたサーボ・スカルに口述しました。
ジェネターのフェレンツは、外科医の手の動きの精密さを再現しうるインプラントの研究に生涯を捧げた。ヴィヴィセクターのマルティナクスはその研究を補佐し、割り当てられたサーヴォスカルに、コロヌス・エクスパンスにおける強化の本質に関する最も包括的な論文の一つを口述したのだった。

languages.text: 基因士费伦茨毕生致力于研究完美复刻船医手部精密动作的植入物。解剖者马丁纳克斯协助了他的研究，并向分派给他的伺服头骨口述了一部关于科罗努斯扩区植入物改造本质的详尽专著。
languages.original_text: Genetor Ferrenz dedicated his life to researching implants capable of replicating the precision of a chirurgeon's hand movements. Vivisector Martinax assisted him in his research and dictated to the assigned servo-skull one of the most comprehensive treatises on the nature of augmentation in the Koronus Expanse.

traits.locale_text: 基因士费伦茨毕生致力于研究完美复刻船医手部精密动作的植入物。解剖者马丁纳克斯协助了他的研究，并向分派给他的伺服头骨口述了一部关于科罗努斯扩区植入物改造本质的详尽专著。

languages.text: Le genetor Ferrenz passa sa vie à tenter de fabriquer des implants capables de la même précision que les mains d'un chirurgeon. Le vivisecteur Martinax l'assista dans ses recherches et dicta à leur servocrâne dédié l'un des traités les plus complets sur la nature de l'augmentation dans les Étendues de Koronus.
languages.original_text: Genetor Ferrenz dedicated his life to researching implants capable of replicating the precision of a chirurgeon's hand movements. Vivisector Martinax assisted him in his research and dictated to the assigned servo-skull one of the most comprehensive treatises on the nature of augmentation in the Koronus Expanse.

traits.locale_text: Le genetor Ferrenz passa sa vie à tenter de fabriquer des implants capables de la même précision que les mains d'un chirurgeon. Le vivisecteur Martinax l'assista dans ses recherches et dicta à leur servocrâne dédié l'un des traités les plus complets sur la nature de l'augmentation dans les Étendues de Koronus.

Le genetor Ferrenz, nommé responsable du secteur Bionica, passa sa vie à tenter de fabriquer des implants capables de la même précision que les mains d'un chirurgeon. Le vivisecteur Martinax l'assista dans ses recherches et dicta à leur servocrâne dédié l'un des traités les plus complets sur la nature de l'augmentation dans les Étendues de Koronus.

languages.text: El genetor Ferrenz dedicó su vida a investigar implantes de brazo capaces de replicar la precisión de los movimientos de un cirujano. El vivisector Martinax le ayudó en su investigación y dictaron a su servocráneo asignado uno de los tratados más exhaustivos sobre los aumentos de toda la Extensión de Koronus.
languages.original_text: Genetor Ferrenz dedicated his life to researching implants capable of replicating the precision of a chirurgeon's hand movements. Vivisector Martinax assisted him in his research and dictated to the assigned servo-skull one of the most comprehensive treatises on the nature of augmentation in the Koronus Expanse.

traits.locale_text: El genetor Ferrenz dedicó su vida a investigar implantes de brazo capaces de replicar la precisión de los movimientos de un cirujano. El vivisector Martinax le ayudó en su investigación y dictaron a su servocráneo asignado uno de los tratados más exhaustivos sobre los aumentos de toda la Extensión de Koronus.

languages.text: Genetör Ferrenz, hayatını bir cerrahın el hareketlerinin hassasiyetini kopyalayabilen implantları araştırmaya adadı. Dirikesimci Martinax, araştırmasında ona yardımcı oldu ve Koronus Enginliği'ndeki ogmentasyonun doğası üzerine en kapsamlı incelemelerden birini kendisine atanmış hizmelete dikte etti.
languages.original_text: Genetor Ferrenz dedicated his life to researching implants capable of replicating the precision of a chirurgeon's hand movements. Vivisector Martinax assisted him in his research and dictated to the assigned servo-skull one of the most comprehensive treatises on the nature of augmentation in the Koronus Expanse.

traits.locale_text: Genetör Ferrenz, hayatını bir cerrahın el hareketlerinin hassasiyetini kopyalayabilen implantları araştırmaya adadı. Dirikesimci Martinax, araştırmasında ona yardımcı oldu ve Koronus Enginliği'ndeki ogmentasyonun doğası üzerine en kapsamlı incelemelerden birini kendisine atanmış hizmelete dikte etti.

languages.text: Genetor Ferrenz widmete sein Leben der Erforschung von Implantaten mit der Präzision der Handbewegungen eines Chirurgeums. Vivisektor Martinax unterstützte ihn bei seinen Forschungen und diktierte einem der abgestellten Servoschädel eine der umfassendsten Abhandlungen über das Wesen der Augmentation in der Koronus-Ausdehnung.
